calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Leslie Schneider.
Petitioners: Shek Kwong Lee and Annie Wah Fung Lim, present in pro per for the minor Joanne Sai Yin Lee, and with Cantonese Interpreter William Guan, parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Joanne Sai Yin Lim.
Decree signed in open court.
